title: UK unemployment rate unexpectedly rises
summary: The UK unemployment rate has unexpectedly risen while job vacancies fell to a five-year low, signaling potential economic weakness as geopolitical tensions begin to impact businesses.
content: The number of UK job vacancies also fell to its lowest level in five years as the initial impact of the Iran war on businesses starts to be seen.

zh.title: 英国失业率意外上升
zh.summary: 随着地缘政治紧张局势开始冲击企业，英国失业率意外上升，职位空缺跌至五年来最低水平，预示经济可能面临疲软。

title: European markets: UK unemployment rises; Germany kicks off Uniper privatization
summary: European stock markets are bracing for a mixed opening as traders evaluate the impact of rising UK unemployment and Germany's Uniper privatization against broader geopolitical tensions.
content: European stocks are expected to open in mixed territory on Tuesday as traders assess the geopolitical landscape.

zh.title: 欧洲市场：英国失业率上升；德国启动Uniper私有化
zh.summary: 欧洲股市准备迎接不确定的开盘，交易员们在评估英国失业率上升和德国Uniper私有化带来的影响，同时还要应对更广泛的地缘政治紧张局势。

title: Elon Musk just lost another lawsuit. Will he keep fighting?
summary: Elon Musk suffered another courtroom defeat in his case against OpenAI, continuing a recent streak of legal losses.
content: Musk's loss against OpenAI is the latest in a string of courtroom defeats.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克刚刚输掉了另一起诉讼。他会继续战斗吗？
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克在与OpenAI的案件中再次败诉，继续了最近的诉讼败诉趋势。

title: Parents' anger at school buses being axed
summary: Parents at a Devon school are protesting plans to eliminate school buses at the end of the academic year, citing disruption to student transportation.
content: Parents criticise the Devon school's plan to end school buses at the end of the academic year.

zh.title: 家长对学校校车被取消的愤怒
zh.summary: 德文一所学校的家长正在抗议在学年末消除校车的计划，理由是这将扰乱学生的交通。

title: Starbucks Korea sacks CEO over controversial 'Tank Day' promotion
summary: Starbucks Korea fired its CEO after a 'Tank Day' promotion campaign was withdrawn due to accusations it referenced a violent historical crackdown.
content: Starbucks withdrew the campaign for its drink tumblers after many said it referenced a bloody crackdown.

zh.title: 星巴克韩国因有争议的"坦克日"促销活动解雇首席执行官
zh.summary: 星巴克韩国在"坦克日"促销活动因被指涉及暴力历史镇压而撤销后解雇了首席执行官。

title: The charity shop which boosted takings by moving outdoors
summary: A UK charity shop increased its daily revenue to £2,000 by shifting to outdoor trading just one day per week, demonstrating innovative retail adaptation.
content: The shop can now make £2,000 in one day after moving to trade outdoors just one day a week.

zh.title: 通过迁至户外增加收入的慈善商店
zh.summary: 一家英国慈善商店通过每周只有一天的户外交易将日收入增加到2000英镑，展示了创新的零售适应能力。

title: Tech investors loved this earnings season — but the Iran war is piling pressure on the companies powering the AI boom
summary: While tech earnings bolstered investor enthusiasm for AI stocks, the chip sector faces rising cost pressures and supply chain constraints related to geopolitical tensions affecting materials access.
content: Stocks continue to rally amid the AI boom, but the chip sector is scrambling to shore up access to key materials as costs rise.

zh.title: 科技投资者喜爱本季度财报 — 但伊朗战争给AI繁荣的推动力施压
zh.summary: 虽然科技企业财报提升了投资者对AI股票的热情，但芯片部门面临与地缘政治紧张局势相关的成本压力上升和供应链制约，这些因素影响了原材料获取。

title: Standard Chartered to cut over 15% of corporate functions roles as it targets higher returns
summary: Standard Chartered plans to cut over 15% of corporate function roles while targeting a 20%+ increase in income per employee by 2028 to boost profitability.
content: Standard Chartered will trim corporate functions roles and target a more than 20% increase in income per employee by 2028 as it seeks stronger returns.

zh.title: 渣打银行计划削减超过15%的公司职能职位以实现更高回报
zh.summary: 渣打银行计划削减超过15%的公司职能职位，同时目标是到2028年实现员工人均收入增长20%以上，以提高盈利能力。

title: After U.S. SEC, Treasury and Justice Department offer billionaire Gautam Adani legal relief
summary: Gautam Adani and his Adani Enterprises received legal relief from U.S. authorities following a Treasury settlement over purchases of sanctioned Iranian energy products.
content: The U.S. Treasury Department settled a case against Adani Enterprises, involving the purchase of sanctioned Iranian energy between November 2023 and June 2025.

zh.title: 美国证监会、财政部和司法部为亿万富翁高塔姆·阿达尼提供法律救济
zh.summary: 高塔姆·阿达尼及其阿达尼企业集团因购买被制裁的伊朗能源产品与美国财政部达成和解，随后获得了美国当局的法律救济。

title: Standard Chartered to cut thousands of roles as AI use increases
summary: Standard Chartered is cutting thousands of jobs as AI adoption accelerates, though the bank plans to reassign affected workers to alternative roles within the organization.
content: The UK-headquartered banking giant aims to move some of the effected workers to other roles in the business.

zh.title: 渣打银行随着AI使用增加将裁减数千个职位
zh.summary: 随着人工智能采用加速，渣打银行正在裁减数千个工作岗位，尽管该银行计划将受影响的员工重新安排到组织内的其他职位。

title: The bond market has a warning for the Fed: Get serious about inflation and potential rate hikes ASAP
summary: Bond market volatility is signaling that the Federal Reserve needs to take aggressive action on inflation and rate hikes to stabilize the Treasury market.
content: Tough talk from the Federal Reserve about rate hikes may be needed to ease the Treasury market’s rout.

zh.title: 债券市场向美联储发出警告：立即严肃对待通胀和可能的加息
zh.summary: 债券市场波动表明，美联储需要对通胀和加息采取积极行动，以稳定美国国债市场。

title: Putin heads to Beijing days after Trump in test of China's balancing act
summary: Putin's visit to Beijing follows Trump's trip, testing China's ability to balance between the U.S. and Russia while Moscow seeks assurance of China's continued alignment.
content: Beijing walks into the summit with the stronger hand while Moscow seeks reassurance that China has not drifted toward Washington after Trump's visit.

zh.title: 普京在特朗普之后访问北京，考验中国的平衡外交
zh.summary: 普京对北京的访问紧跟特朗普的访问，考验中国在美国和俄罗斯之间平衡的能力，同时莫斯科寻求中国继续支持的保证。

title: Oil prices fall as Trump postpones Iran strike, easing supply disruption fears
summary: Oil prices fell after U.S. President Trump announced he would postpone a planned military strike on Iran at the request of key Middle Eastern leaders. The delay reduced concerns about potential supply disruptions and geopolitical escalation in the region.
content: Oil prices fell after U.S. President Donald Trump said he would postpone a planned military strike on Iran following requests from key Middle Eastern leaders.

zh.title: 特朗普推迟伊朗打击计划，油价下跌，缓解供应中断担忧
zh.summary: 美国总统特朗普宣布他将应中东关键领导人的要求推迟对伊朗的计划军事打击后，油价下跌。这一延迟减少了人们对潜在供应中断和地区地缘政治升级的担忧。

title: Japan's economy grows at annualized 2.1% rate in first quarter, beating expectations
summary: Japan's economy grew at an annualized 2.1% rate in the first quarter, significantly exceeding economist forecasts of 0.4% growth. The result marks improvement from the previous quarter's 0.3% expansion.
content: The figure beat projections of 0.4% from Reuters-polled economists, and against the 0.3% in the last quarter.

zh.title: 日本第一季度经济以年化2.1%的速度增长，超过预期
zh.summary: 日本第一季度经济以年化2.1%的速度增长，远超经济学家预测的0.4%增长。这一结果比上一季度0.3%的增长有所改善。

title: Asia markets open broadly higher as oil eases after Trump delays planned Iran strike
summary: Asian markets opened broadly higher on Tuesday following declines in oil prices after Trump delayed a planned Iran strike. The rally reflects reduced concerns about supply disruptions and geopolitical escalation.
content: Asia-Pacific markets opened broadly higher on Tuesday, amid lower oil prices after President Donald Trump said he is postponing a scheduled attack on Iran

zh.title: 特朗普推迟伊朗打击计划，油价下跌后，亚洲市场大幅走高
zh.summary: 在特朗普推迟对伊朗的计划打击后，油价下跌，亚洲市场周二大幅走高。这一反弹反映了人们对供应中断和地缘政治升级担忧的减少。
